name: Sword Coast
summary: A long, dangerous stretch of western Faerûn where city-states, merchant roads, wild frontiers and ancient ruins press against the Sea of Swords.
politics: Sword Coast is shaped by local powers, trade needs and old conflicts.
Adventurers can shift local balances quickly if they earn trust or fear.
culture: People of Sword Coast carry strong local customs and stories.
Rumour, reputation and practical help matter to most communities.
rumours: Something old has stirred somewhere in Sword Coast.
A recent disappearance has locals worried.
A merchant is paying quietly for reliable blades.
dmSecrets: A hidden faction is exploiting unrest in Sword Coast.
An old site nearby is connected to a larger campaign mystery.
